rulings.Case Title: FRANCISCO JOSE GALVEZ VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Re: Demurrer To Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Jarrod Y. Nakano In Support Thereof; And [Proposed] Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 05, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO GALVEZ's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Re: Demurrer To Complaint continued to April 15, 2016. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of reply to department 501 no later than April 5, 2016 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. ELLA JEFFERSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Reconsider Order Granting Ex Parte App For Entry Of Judgmnt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 05, 2016, line 10. DEFENDANT ELLA JEFFERSON's Motion To Reconsider Order Granting Ex Parte Application For Entry Of Judgment DENIED. Moving party fails to meet the CCP 1008 burden on all the grounds on which judgment was requested and entered. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIKE MARCHASIN VS. THELMA FAMORCA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 05, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT THELMA FAMORCA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CRISTINA CHAVEZ VS. CESAR ZAMORA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 05, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANTS CESAR ZAMORA and MIGUEL YANES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege service of Form 1007 and to attach a complete copy of the Notice served on Defendant. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT J WORLEY VS. TRICIA PETERSEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 05, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANT TRICIA PETERSEN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the CCP 1166. CCP 1160-1 does not require service of notice. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts re: force, menace or threats. = (501/REQ)
